text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... We've had a good run, but I'm afraid I'm
done for...
choice_data_list: What in the world do you mean?
What in the world do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the concern, but this is something
I've gotta take care of myself. Please, forget I
said anything!
choice_data_list: Don't say that. I want to help.
Don't say that. I want to help.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're too nice for you own good. But since you
insist, I'll tell you. The thing is...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've got a honkin' huge zit on my forehead, and it
hurts like Heckle and Jyde!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Think my life will ever be the same?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm relieved it's nothing life-threatening, but she's
very concerned about her skin. I take note to be
more understanding of that moving forward.
